title: rubus obtusangulus
intro: Rubus obtusangulus, also known as the Thimble Bramble, is a species of bramble in the rose family. It is native to eastern Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The Thimble Bramble has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Rubus obtusangulus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
